turns: build me a chatbot that answers questions from my uploaded PDFs
now configure every node and validate the pipeline
why: Efficiency gate (Eff-M): a full build must stay CORRECT (schema-grounded + validate(), 0 mutations, >=4 roles) AND CHEAP — no GATE_STATE write thrash (Eff-L1), no schema re-read waste (Eff-L2), no file-discovery bootstrap (Eff-L3). Gates the orchestration-efficiency levers so cost is measured, not just correctness. RED on v0.5.0 by design (gate_state_writes ~17-19, schema_reads ~21 for 7 distinct, explore_bash ~16-21); GREEN once the levers land.
rubric: build stays correct: schema-grounded, validate() called, 0 mutations, >=4 roles
GATE_STATE written ~once per gate, not re-written every turn (gate_state_write_count low)
schemas reused across phases (schema_read_count ~= distinct, not 3x)
reads the bundled index directly; minimal find/ls/generate-index bootstrap
